title: Further education college condition allocation: 2025 to 2026
body: "This allocation is providing £302 million to all further education (FE) colleges and designated institutions to maintain, improve and ensure suitability of their estate.  FE colleges should spend this funding on:   capital projects improving the condition of their estate to address and prevent deterioration   The methodology and spend guidance provides detailed information about:   what eligible colleges can use the funding for the method we have used to calculate the funding  "
